'''âj-j-d''' ('''jajada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photolithograph|photolithograph]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photolithograph|photolithograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-j-d
|-
! Lemma
| jajada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jajadithi|jajadithi]] || [[word:jajadiji|jajadiji]] || [[word:jajadishi|jajadishi]] || [[word:jajadi|jajadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jajaduthuth|jajaduthuth]] || [[word:jajadujuj|jajadujuj]] || [[word:jajadushush|jajadushush]] || [[word:jajad|jajad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jajaduthu|jajaduthu]] || [[word:jajaduju|jajaduju]] || [[word:jajadushu|jajadushu]] || [[word:jajadu|jajadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jajadufuth|jajadufuth]] || [[word:jajadufuj|jajadufuj]] || [[word:jajadufush|jajadufush]] || [[word:jajaduf|jajaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jajadethe|jajadethe]] || [[word:jajadeje|jajadeje]] || [[word:jajadeshe|jajadeshe]] || [[word:jajade|jajade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jajadothoth|jajadothoth]] || [[word:jajadojoj|jajadojoj]] || [[word:jajadoshosh|jajadoshosh]] || [[word:jajad|jajad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jajadotho|jajadotho]] || [[word:jajadojo|jajadojo]] || [[word:jajadosho|jajadosho]] || [[word:jajado|jajado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jajadofoth|jajadofoth]] || [[word:jajadofoj|jajadofoj]] || [[word:jajadofosh|jajadofosh]] || [[word:jajadof|jajadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jajadĂŠthĂŠ|jajadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jajadĂŠjĂŠ|jajadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jajadĂŠshĂŠ|jajadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jajadĂŠ|jajadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jajadathath|jajadathath]] || [[word:jajadajaj|jajadajaj]] || [[word:jajadashash|jajadashash]] || [[word:jajad|jajad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jajadatha|jajadatha]] || [[word:jajadaja|jajadaja]] || [[word:jajadasha|jajadasha]] || [[word:jajada|jajada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jajadafath|jajadafath]] || [[word:jajadafaj|jajadafaj]] || [[word:jajadafash|jajadafash]] || [[word:jajadaf|jajadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jajadasha|jajadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojajadasha|gojajadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijajadasha|gokijajadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jajadnĂŒsha|jajadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojajadnknĂŒsha|gojajadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijajadnĂŒsha|gokijajadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jajadshĂ«sha|jajadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojajadnkshĂ«sha|gojajadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijajadshĂ«sha|gokijajadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jajadrosha|jajadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojajadnkrosha|gojajadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijajadrosha|gokijajadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jajadmusha|jajadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojajadnkmusha|gojajadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijajadmusha|gokijajadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jajadsherasha|jajadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojajadnksherasha|gojajadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijajadsherasha|gokijajadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jajadngasha|jajadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojajadnkngasha|gojajadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijajadngasha|gokijajadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jajadyasha|jajadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojajadnkyasha|gojajadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijajadyasha|gokijajadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jajadyamasha|jajadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojajadnkyamasha|gojajadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijajadyamasha|gokijajadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jajadnĂŒshĂ«sha|jajadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojajadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojajadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijajadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijajadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jajadnĂŒrosha|jajadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojajadnknĂŒrosha|gojajadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijajadnĂŒrosha|gokijajadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jajadnĂŒmusha|jajadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojajadnknĂŒmusha|gojajadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijajadnĂŒmusha|gokijajadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jajadshĂ«nĂŒsha|jajadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojajadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojajadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijajadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijajadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jajadshĂ«rosha|jajadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojajadnkshĂ«rosha|gojajadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijajadshĂ«rosha|gokijajadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jajadshĂ«musha|jajadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojajadnkshĂ«musha|gojajadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijajadshĂ«musha|gokijajadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jajadronĂŒsha|jajadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojajadnkronĂŒsha|gojajadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijajadronĂŒsha|gokijajadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jajadroshĂ«sha|jajadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojajadnkroshĂ«sha|gojajadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijajadroshĂ«sha|gokijajadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jajadromusha|jajadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojajadnkromusha|gojajadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijajadromusha|gokijajadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jajadmunĂŒsha|jajadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojajadnkmunĂŒsha|gojajadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijajadmunĂŒsha|gokijajadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jajadmushĂ«sha|jajadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojajadnkmushĂ«sha|gojajadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijajadmushĂ«sha|gokijajadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jajadmurosha|jajadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojajadnkmurosha|gojajadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijajadmurosha|gokijajadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jajad|jajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠd|jĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojajad|hojajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠjĂŠd|hojĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojajad|hohojajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠjĂŠd|hohojĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjajad|nĂŒjajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠjĂŠd|nĂŒjĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjajad|nĂŒnĂŒjajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠjĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjajad|nĂŻjajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠjĂŠd|nĂŻjĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjajad|nĂŻnĂŻjajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠjĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujajad|lujajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠjĂŠd|lujĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujajad|lulujajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠjĂŠd|lulujĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijajad|lijajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠjĂŠd|lijĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijajad|lilijajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠjĂŠd|lilijĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojajad|kojajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠjĂŠd|kojĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojajad|kokojajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠjĂŠd|kokojĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejajad|kejajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠjĂŠd|kejĂŠjĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejajad|kekejajad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠjĂŠd|kekejĂŠjĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
